error_signature: Item has no JSON property called 'GV23989n001_huegrp90.3989Y'
title: XML node not recognizing input property
symptom: The XML node throws an error stating 'Item has no JSON property called 'GV23989n001_huegrp90.3989Y'' when trying to access the input property.
applies_when: Receiving webhook events with XML payload
not_this_if: Input property is correctly mapped to the XML node
root_cause: The XML node requires the name of the variable holding the XML data, not the value itself. If the input property is not correctly set, the node cannot access the expected data, leading to the error.
fix_steps: Add a Set node before the XML node
Map the body.message to a variable called 'message'
Ensure the XML node is configured to use 'message' as the input property
agent_instruction: Map the body.message to a variable named 'message' in a Set node before the XML node.
